ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan segment */,
  "credit_score_range" TEXT /* Range of credit scores for the segment (e.g., (664, 680]) */,
  "total_loans" INTEGER /* Total number of loans in the segment */,
  "percentage_of_loans" REAL /* Percentage of total loans in the segment */,
  "total_defaults" INTEGER /* Total number of defaults in the segment */,
  "percentage_of_defaults" REAL /* Percentage of loans that defaulted in the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan segment */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., active, defaulted, paid off) */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was originated */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the loan matures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES loan_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the borrower (e.g., employed, self-employed, unemployed) */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the borrower (e.g., good, bad, no credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Name of the loan type (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate_range" TEXT /* Range of interest rates for the loan type (e.g., 5-10%) */,
  "loan_term_range" TEXT /* Range of loan terms for the loan type (e.g., 1-5 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date of the default */,
  "default_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the default (e.g., job loss, medical emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defaults_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit score */,
  "credit_reporting_agency" TEXT /* Credit reporting agency that provided the credit score (e.g., Experian, TransUnion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "risk_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Name of the risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_risk" (
  "loan_risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan risk assessment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "risk_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk category */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the loan */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_risk_risk_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_category_id") REFERENCES risk_categories ("risk_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_risk_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_originations" (
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan origination */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan origination */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the loan was originated */,
  "origination_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the loan was originated (e.g., online, branch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_originations_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_originations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., delinquency, default) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action that was performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
